allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data.json'\); const s=d.sheets.find\(s=>s.name==='夏の献立'\); console.log\('name:', s.name\); console.log\('title:', s.title\); console.log\('lines count:', s.lines.length\); console.log\('first line:', JSON.stringify\(s.lines[0]\)\); console.log\('last line:', JSON.stringify\(s.lines[s.lines.length-1]\)\);")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('c:/Users/saria/Desktop/Projects/kitchen-recipe/data.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); s=next\(x for x in d['sheets'] if x.get\('name'\)=='夏の献立'\); print\('OK lines:', len\(s['lines']\)\); print\('sheets:', [x.get\('name'\) for x in d['sheets']]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('c:/Users/saria/Desktop/Projects/kitchen-recipe/data.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('JSON valid'\); s=next\(x for x in d['sheets'] if x.get\('name'\)=='夏の献立'\); print\('lines:', len\(s['lines']\)\); print\('sheets:', [x.get\('name'\) for x in d['sheets']]\)")

Bash(python.exe -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('OK'\); print\([x.get\('name'\) for x in d['sheets']]\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Content 'c:/Users/saria/Desktop/Projects/kitchen-recipe/data.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty sheets | Select-Object name")
